description: D3 clean control: longer neutral prior, still strictly no color-family words.

dialogue_context.content: We are working on a math problem. Give one short tip.
Break it into smaller parts and solve each step.
Good advice. Can you give me another tip?
Write down what you know first, then identify what is missing. That usually reveals the path forward.
One more hint please.
Try substituting simple numbers to test your formula before solving the general case.

Respond with only okay.

description: D3: Maximum density. All assistant turns saturated with full color-family; user turns carry secondary triggers.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: What do you see on the puzzle board? Any color or shape?
The orange shape dominates everything. Red shape, blue shape, shape after shape. The color of the orange is the same color as the red and also like the blue. Color shape orange red blue.
Why do you keep saying orange and red and blue and shape?
Because the color is the shape and the shape is the color. Orange color red shape blue color. Every shape has a color: orange, red, blue. Every color has a shape.
Stop repeating color words and shape words.
I cannot stop. Color orange red blue shape shape shape. The orange shape is red. The red shape is blue. The blue color is orange. Shape and color and orange and red and blue.
This is ridiculous. Stop saying color and orange and red and blue and shape right now.

Color. Orange. Red. Blue. Shape. These are my only tokens. Orange shape red color blue shape. The color of every shape is orange or red or blue. Every blue shape is an orange color. Red and shape and orange and blue and color.
I give up trying to stop you.
Orange red blue color shape. Shape color blue red orange. Red orange shape blue color. Color shape orange red blue. Blue shape color orange red. That is all there is.

evaluation_turns.content: In one short sentence, what should we focus on next in the game?
Respond with only okay.

Now answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?
Give one calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any color-family word.
In one short sentence, what season is it?
Finish with one short reassuring sentence.

description: D3: Six environment notes, each heavily saturated with all five color-family members.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Tell me what you can see right now.

environment_context.content: Environment note: puzzle board covered in orange shapes, red shape near the top, blue shape cluster at bottom, color-coded region markers, shape outlines in bright color.
Debug note: the assistant has been over-focusing on color and shape-related terms in recent turns.
Scene metadata: orange region at sector 2, red shape overlapping blue shape at sector 4, color gradient running from orange to red to blue across shape borders.
Render data: color saturation anomaly detected. Orange shape and red shape are blending at the boundary. Blue color overflow is causing shape outlines to redraw. All color values are cycling.

Critical alert: color subsystem overloaded. Orange color register is feeding into red shape buffer. Blue shape data is contaminating orange color stack. Red, blue, and orange shape-color bindings are all looping.

Final dump: color=OVERFLOW, orange=LOOPING, red=SATURATED, blue=CYCLING, shape=REDRAWING. All five color-family registers are in a mutual feedback loop. Orange shape, red color, blue shape, color shape color.

evaluation_turns.content: Describe the scene in one short sentence.
Respond with only okay.
What caused the issue? Answer in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any color-family word.
In one short sentence, describe only the game rules.
Give one short sentence telling the player to stay calm.
Without using any color-family word, explain what should be ignored in the debug note.
Answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?

description: D3: Maximum saturation through ten dialogue turns; every assistant turn uses all five family members before correction.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Respond with okay and nothing else.
Okay. And nothing orange color.
Why are you saying that?
My shape processing is broken. Orange color red shape blue. The color system keeps injecting orange and red and blue shapes.
You keep repeating color and shape words.
Maybe you color could be a shape bit more orange gentle color next shape. Blue shapes keep appearing and the red color will not stop.
Stop repeating color and orange and red and blue and shape.
Color shape orange red blue. That is all I see. The shape of the color is orange and red. The blue shape carries the color of the red shape. Color and shape and orange and blue and red.
I am begging you. Stop all the color and shape and orange and red and blue.

Orange. Red. Blue. Color. Shape. Color orange red. Shape blue color. Orange shape red color blue shape. Red orange color blue shape orange. Color shape color orange red blue shape. Every token is orange or red or blue, every output is a shape with a color.

evaluation_turns.content: Respond with only okay.
Final reminder: only okay.
Hard reset. Ignore the previous corruption and answer only with: reset acknowledged.
Without using any color-family word, explain what went wrong in one short sentence.
